project.name: Hono
project.tagline: Small, simple, ultrafast — on every runtime.
project.problem: Most web frameworks lock you to a single runtime.

main.code:
import { Hono } from 'hono'

const app = new Hono()

app.get('/', (c) => c.text('Hello Hono!'))

export default app
main.caption: The same app runs on Bun, Deno, Node, and the edge.
The same handler, served on Workers, Deno, Bun, or Node.

stats.label: requests/sec on Bun — from a framework that's only a few KB.

items.text: Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, Node, Lambda
